title: cyperus minimus
intro: Cyperus minimus, also known as the small-flowered flatsedge or small-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. The medicinal properties of Cyperus minimus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antidote for certain toxins. The herbal preparations of Cyperus minimus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
